prompt: Create a bar chart comparing MMLU benchmark scores across 4 models: GPT-4 (86.4% ± 1.2%), Claude 3.5 Sonnet (88.7% ± 0.9%), Gemini Ultra (83.7% ± 1.5%), Llama 3.1 405B (85.2% ± 1.1%). The chart should have proper axis labels, a title, and use Anthropic's visual style. Include error bars showing the standard deviations.

assertions.description: Script calls use_anthropic_defaults() or loads anthropic.mplstyle
Uses PRETTY_CYCLE hex values from anthro_colors
Chart includes error bars (yerr parameter or errorbar call)
Bar annotations use normal weight, not bold
